title: Enchanted Sails
body:
![banner gif](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/enchantedsails/enchantedsails-banner.gif)

**Enchanted Sails adds enchantments for your boats!**

Enchant the boat item with an Enchanting Table or Anvil, then place and go.

## Enchantments

### Tailwind (I-II)

Increases the speed of a boat. Max level 2. Available from the Enchanting Table.

### Control

Replaces smooth turning with instant, discrete rotation when steering a boat. Available from the Enchanting Table.
